Hi, I'm Jason.

I'm an AI engineer at BETA Technologies — we build eVTOL airplanes. I tinker with agents all day and try to make flying electric taxis real, faster.

Previously I did pretraining research at Hugging Face, where I helped train StarCoder and SmolLM, and built WikiRace Eval.

Before that I spent five years writing software to make affordable housing work better at Kismet. On weekends I make paperwork and PDFs less painful with Barracuda Form Filler.

Also — I'm selling my beloved stealth camper van. I lived in it for nine months and now can't park it at my new apartment. Come buy it and go have an adventure.

jason.t.stillerman@gmail.com
